name: Subway Surfers
description: Run through the subway tracks and dodge oncoming trains in this endless runner game!

name: Candy Crush
description: Match colorful candies to clear the board and progress through hundreds of levels.

name: Moto X3M
description: Perform crazy stunts on your motorcycle through challenging obstacle courses!

name: Fireboy and Watergirl
description: Help Fireboy and Watergirl navigate through temples filled with puzzles and obstacles.

name: Stickman Hook
description: Swing through levels like Spider-Man using your grappling hook!

name: Shell Shockers
description: Enter the arena as an egg soldier and battle other players in this multiplayer FPS!
Combine numbered tiles to reach the 2048 tile in this addictive puzzle game.

name: Temple Run 2
description: Run, jump, and slide your way through ancient temple ruins while being chased!

name: Slope
description: Control a ball rolling down a colorful 3D slope at high speeds!

name: Among Us
description: Find the impostor among your crewmates or sabotage the spaceship as the impostor!

name: Crossy Road
description: Navigate through traffic and obstacles in this modern take on classic arcade games.

name: Fruit Ninja
description: Slice fruits with ninja precision while avoiding bombs in this fast-paced game!

name: Geometry Dash
description: Jump and fly through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

name: Hill Climb Racing
description: Drive your vehicle across bumpy terrain and perform amazing tricks!

name: Pac-Man
description: Navigate mazes while eating dots and avoiding ghosts in this classic arcade game.

name: Agar.io
description: Consume smaller cells to grow bigger while avoiding being eaten by larger ones!

name: Bubble Shooter
description: Match and pop colorful bubbles to clear the board in this relaxing puzzle game.

name: Stack Ball
description: Smash through colorful platforms to reach the bottom in this 3D arcade game!

name: Slither.io
description: Control a snake and consume glowing orbs to grow longer than other players!

name: Tunnel Rush
description: Navigate through a twisting 3D tunnel filled with obstacles at high speed!
